response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise, cloud strategy leadership, and 15+ years of experience, which the candidate partially meets but lacks explicit evidence of AI product leadership or director-level impact.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling and open-source platforms (e.g., GISCollective)
Entrepreneurial mindset with founder experience and startup-like contributions
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product leadership or PhD-level specialization in AI-related fields
Career seniority (14 years) slightly below the 15-year requirement
Limited evidence of strategic cloud/AI advising or external thought leadership
